jd:
高级性能测试工程师招聘。负责性能测试、压力测试、负载测试、稳定性测试、瓶颈定位、性能优化、监控告警、回归测试、CI/CD、缺陷跟踪。

Required skills (each repeated 5 times for TF top-K ranking):
Python Python Python Python Python — scripting, custom load tools.
Pytest Pytest Pytest Pytest Pytest — extend with perf scenarios.
MySQL MySQL MySQL MySQL MySQL — slow SQL profiling, indexing.
Linux Linux Linux Linux Linux — top, vmstat, iostat, perf.
Git Git Git Git Git — version control.
JIRA JIRA JIRA JIRA JIRA — bug tracking.

需要熟悉自动化测试、接口测试、白盒测试、Web测试、APP测试、敏捷测试、回归测试、测试体系、测试用例、测试计划、缺陷跟踪、报告输出、CI/CD、JMeter、Gatling、Prometheus、Grafana 等工具。
